table.name: t_fans
table.Comment: 用户粉丝表

table.name: t_following
table.Comment: 用户关注表

table.name: t_note
table.Comment: 笔记表

table.name: t_note_collection
table.Comment: 笔记收藏表

table.name: t_note_count
table.Comment: 笔记计数表

table.name: t_note_like
table.Comment: 笔记点赞表

table.name: t_permission
table.Comment: 权限表

table.name: t_role
table.Comment: 角色表

table.name: t_role_permission_rel
table.Comment: 用户权限表

table.name: t_topic
table.Comment: 话题表

table.name: t_user
table.Comment: 用户表

table.name: t_user_count
table.Comment: 用户计数表

table.name: t_user_role_rel
table.Comment: 用户角色表

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: is_content_empty
column.Comment: 内容是否为空(0：不为空 1：空)

column.name: img_uris
column.Comment: 笔记图片链接(逗号隔开)

column.name: visible
column.Comment: 可见范围(0：公开,所有人可见 1：仅对自己可见)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0：待审核 1：正常展示 2：被删除(逻辑删除) 3：被下架)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 收藏状态(0：取消收藏 1：收藏)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 点赞状态(0：取消点赞 1：点赞)

column.name: sort
column.Comment: 管理系统中的显示顺序

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: sort
column.Comment: 管理系统中的显示顺序

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: is_deleted
column.Comment: 逻辑删除(0：未删除 1：已删除)

column.name: address_type
column.Comment: 执行器地址类型：0=自动注册、1=手动录入

column.name: address_list
column.Comment: 执行器地址列表，多地址逗号分隔

column.name: schedule_conf
column.Comment: 调度配置，值含义取决于调度类型

column.name: executor_timeout
column.Comment: 任务执行超时时间，单位秒

column.name: executor_address
column.Comment: 执行器地址，本次执行的地址

column.name: executor_sharding_param
column.Comment: 执行器任务分片参数，格式如 1/2

column.name: alarm_status
column.Comment: 告警状态：0-默认、1-无需告警、2-告警成功、3-告警失败

column.name: permission
column.Comment: 权限：执行器ID列表，多个逗号分割
